description.value:
Category: Ninjutsu

You learn to empower your Ninjutsu with more precise chakra, empowering its effects.

You gain the following benefits:

• When you cast a ninjutsu you know, you can spend 10 chakra.

If you do, you double the jutsu's potential impact granting it one of the following effects based;

- If your ninjutsu requires an attack roll, when you roll damage die, you treat all 1's and 2's as 3.

- If your ninjutsu forces a creature to make a saving throw, if they would take a reaction in response to your ninjutsu, they double the chakra cost of the jutsu used.

If the reaction they took does not cost chakra, they instead must spend 10 chakra to take the reaction.

• Ninjutsu you cast cannot have its damage reduced by more than half as a result of Jutsu, Features or Traits.

Creatures with natural resistances or immunities still reduce damage as normal.

• When you would make a Constitution (Chakra control) check to maintain concentration on a Ninjutsu you cast, you may add a bonus to the check equal to the highest ranked Ninjutsu you are concentrating on.

(D- Rank: 1, C-Rank: 2, B-Rank: 3, A-Rank: 4, S-Rank: 5)
